creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Are you the maintainer of this port?  The maintainer address is cgr.nil@gmail.com which is one character off from yours.  Perhaps a typo?

You should leave the pkg-config parts for finding ncurses in.  Adding USES=pkgconfig should make that work.  Alternatively, patch in ${NCURSESLIB} and ${NCURSESINC} instead of hardcoding.
